task_description: Fix all security vulnerabilities (Gemini API key exposure, hardcoded passcode, exposed admin email) and comprehensively improve mobile UX (bottom navigation, text overflow fixes, loading states, chat persistence, error boundary, style quiz fix, scroll-to-top).

verification.summary: npx tsc -b --noEmit passes clean, npx vite build succeeds. No test framework in project. All security grep checks pass. Semantic review issues (proxy origin check, body validation, cached 503, sessionStorage cap, positioning overlap) all fixed.
